tools.name: search_french_companies
tools.description: Search French companies by name or SIREN (official INSEE Sirene / INPI RNE data). Returns the top 10 matches. Paid via x402 ($0.001 in USDC).

tools.name: get_french_company_profile
tools.description: Full official profile of a French company by SIREN: legal name, legal form, head office, NAF code, workforce, officers, collective agreements, VAT number. Paid via x402 ($0.005 in USDC).

tools.name: list_french_company_establishments
tools.description: List all establishments (SIRET) of a French company with addresses and status. Paid via x402 ($0.003 in USDC).

tools.name: get_french_company_default_risk
tools.description: Default-risk score (0-100) for a French company at ~12 months: a transparent, documented scorecard from filed financial ratios (structure, profitability, liquidity, debt service, trend) + company age + a hard BODACC override (active insolvency / liquidation). Returns score, qualitative band, every c

tools.name: get_french_sector_benchmarks
tools.description: Sector benchmarks for a French NAF activity code (any level: 68, 68.2, 68.20, 68.20B): number of active companies, median company age (+quartiles), workforce-bracket distribution, and — when at least 5 companies file public accounts — median revenue, EBITDA margin, pre-tax result and debt ratio. Pla

tools.name: get_french_company_capital
tools.description: Ownership / capital structure of a French company, extracted by AI from the latest PUBLIC articles of association filed at the INPI registry: share capital, legal form, shareholders (name, role, birth year, ownership %), notable clauses, with confidence and the source document. Reconstructed from pu

tools.name: get_french_company_accounts_notes
tools.description: Structured qualitative signals from a French company's filed annual accounts (the 'annexe'), extracted by AI from the latest PUBLIC accounts PDF at the INPI registry: accounting-method types (closed list), average workforce, subsidiaries & participations, off-balance-sheet commitments as {type, amou

tools.name: get_french_company_capital_links
tools.description: Single-level capital links between a French company and other LEGAL ENTITIES, from public filings: upstream holders (legal-entity shareholders named in the public articles of association) and downstream participations (subsidiaries in the accounts annexe). No natural person, no control threshold, no

tools.name: get_french_company_intellectual_property
tools.description: Industrial-property portfolio of a French company from INPI open data: trademarks, patents and designs filed (counts + recent items with number, title, status, date, classification). An R&D/brand-value signal. Patent inventor names (natural persons) are never returned. Paid via x402 ($0.03 in USDC).

tools.name: get_french_company_changes
tools.description: New official BODACC gazette announcements for a French company SINCE a given date (poll-mode surveillance for a portfolio): insolvency, deregistration, sales, filings, changes — reverse-chronological. Detects new BODACC publications, not field-level edits of the profile. A company with no new announ

tools.name: search_french_company_directors
tools.description: Reverse director search: list the French companies where a person of a given surname holds (or held) an office, with the company SIREN, name and the person's role — for due diligence and network mapping. Person data limited to surname, first names, role and birth year. Homonyms are not disambiguated

tools.name: get_french_company_legal_alerts
tools.description: Legal alerts for a French company from the official BODACC gazette: insolvency proceedings, deregistrations, business sales. Paid via x402 ($0.01 in USDC).

tools.name: get_french_company_financials
tools.description: Annual financial data of a French company from filed accounts (revenue, EBITDA, net income, ratios — INPI/Banque de France), plus the full structured tax-form line items (liasse fiscale) from the INPI registry for the latest 3 public fiscal years. Paid via x402 ($0.01 in USDC).

tools.name: get_french_company_public_procurement
tools.description: Public procurement contracts won by a French company (official DECP data): buyers, amounts, dates. Paid via x402 ($0.01 in USDC).

tools.name: search_european_companies
tools.description: Search European companies by name across official registers in one unified schema (Norway, Estonia, Latvia local bases; Denmark/UK when enabled; worldwide GLEIF/LEI coverage). Paid via x402 ($0.003 in USDC).

tools.name: get_european_company_profile
tools.description: Unified European company profile by country and national register ID — same JSON schema for every country (identity, legal form, normalized status, head office, VAT, LEI, official register link). Paid via x402 ($0.01 in USDC).

tools.name: get_french_company_pdf_report
tools.description: On-demand PDF report of a French company (formatted KYB file: identity, officers, legal alerts, financials, sanctions screening; includes the AI health summary when cached). Returns the PDF as base64. Paid via x402 ($0.50 in USDC).

tools.name: list_french_company_documents
tools.description: List official documents filed by a French company at the INPI RNE registry: legal deeds (statutes, general-meeting minutes, mergers...) and filed annual accounts, with document IDs to download the PDFs. Paid via x402 ($0.02 in USDC).

tools.name: download_french_company_document
tools.description: Download an official company document (PDF) from the INPI RNE registry: statutes, general-meeting minutes, filed annual accounts... Use IDs from list_french_company_documents. Returns the PDF as base64 — documents typically weigh 1-10 MB. Paid via x402 ($0.10 in USDC).

tools.name: prospect_french_companies
tools.description: Multi-criteria prospecting over the full French registry (29.8M companies): filter by NAF activity code, departement/postal code, legal form, workforce, age, RGE certification, gender-equality index. Returns up to 100 active companies per page; each page is one x402 payment ($0.02 in USDC).

tools.name: get_french_company_health_summary
tools.description: AI-generated business-health summary of a French company (in French), produced from official data only: strengths, warning signs, activity trend, confidence level. Cached 7 days. Paid via x402 ($0.15 in USDC).

tools.name: get_french_company_kyb_file
tools.description: Complete KYB (Know Your Business) file for a French company in one call — a comprehensive BUNDLE consolidating identity, officers, BODACC legal alerts, filed financials, sanctions screening of the company and each officer (5 official lists), VAT number and a completeness score. Use this when you wan

tools.name: get_french_company_kyb_batch
tools.description: Batch KYB: full KYB files for 2 to 100 French companies in one call. Billed per company at $0.105 (30% off the $0.15 unit price) via x402 — the amount is the unit price times the number of SIREN. A SIREN with no diffusible company is returned with trouve=false and billed as one lookup. Ideal for pro

tools.name: screen_sanctions_lists
tools.description: Screen a person or company name against the 5 official sanctions lists (UN consolidated, EU FSF, US OFAC SDN, UK Sanctions List, French asset-freeze register). Returns fuzzy matches with a 0-100 confidence score — never a bare yes/no. Paid via x402 ($0.02 in USDC).

tools.name: validate_eu_vat_number
tools.description: Validate any EU intra-community VAT number against the official VIES service (all member states). Paid via x402 ($0.003 in USDC).

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_french_company_accounts_notes · Private data: get_french_sector_benchmarks, get_french_company_capital, get_french_company_pdf_report, list_french_company_documents, download_french_company_document, get_french_company_kyb_file, get_french_company_kyb_batch · Public sink: get_french_company_capital, get_french_company_accounts_notes.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_french_company_accounts_notes · Private data: get_french_sector_benchmarks, get_french_company_capital, get_french_company_pdf_report, list_french_company_documents, download_french_company_document, get_french_company_kyb_file, get_french_company_kyb_batch · Public sink: get_french_company_capital, get_french_company_accounts_notes

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "get_french_company_kyb_file" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Complete KYB (Know Your Business) file for a French company in one call: identity, officers, BODACC legal alerts, filed financials, sanctions screening of the company and each officer (5 official lists), VAT number, completeness score. Paid via x402 ($0.15 in USDC)." → after: "Complete KYB (Know Your Business) file for a French company in one call — a comprehensive BUNDLE consolidating identity, officers, BODACC legal alerts, filed financials, sanctions screening of the company and each officer (5 official lists), VAT number and a completeness score. Use this when you wan"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
